sentences.target: Die Einrichtung gefällt mir richtig gut.

translations.de: Die Einrichtung gefällt mir richtig gut.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích cách trang trí.
translations.nl: Ik vind de inrichting heel mooi.
translations.da: Jeg kan rigtig godt lide indretningen.
translations.ja: インテリアがすごく気に入っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; agrees with feminine singular nominative head noun 'Einrichtung' to mark the subject.
Common noun (feminine); serves as the subject. Lexically can mean 'furnishing/setup' or 'institution' depending on context.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a dative experiencer ('mir'). Expresses that the subject is pleasing.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; experiencer argument required by 'gefallen'.
Degree adverb intensifying 'gut' (the evaluation of how pleasing it is).
Adverbial evaluation complement with 'gefallen' (predicative use); denotes a high degree of pleasing.

sentences.target: Die Einrichtung im Büro ist alt.

translations.de: Die Einrichtung im Büro ist alt.
translations.es: El mobiliario de la oficina es viejo.
translations.fr: Le mobilier du bureau est vieux.
translations.pt: O mobiliário do escritório é velho.
translations.vi: Nội thất văn phòng đã cũ.
translations.el: Τα έπιπλα του γραφείου είναι παλιά.
translations.ro: Mobilierul de la birou e vechi.
translations.ja: オフィスの家具は古いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; agrees with feminine singular nominative 'Einrichtung' as subject.
Common noun (feminine); head of the subject NP. Here refers to furnishings/interior.
Preposition 'in' contracted with the definite article 'dem' (dative). Introduces a postnominal PP modifying 'Einrichtung'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative). Head of the PP specifying location.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective 'alt'.
Predicate adjective describing the subject via the copula.

sentences.target: Die Einrichtung hat bis achtzehn Uhr geöffnet.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈaɪ̯nʁɪçtʊŋ hat bɪs ˈaxt͡seːn uːɐ̯ ɡəˈœfnət./

translations.de: Die Einrichtung hat bis achtzehn Uhr geöffnet.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈaɪ̯nʁɪçtʊŋ hat bɪs ˈaxt͡seːn uːɐ̯ ɡəˈœfnət./
translations.en: The facility is open until six p.m.
translations.es: El centro está abierto hasta las seis.
translations.fr: Le centre est ouvert jusqu'à 18 heures.
translations.it: La struttura è aperta fino alle 18.
translations.ko: 시설은 오후 여섯 시까지 열려 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个场馆开放到下午六点。
translations.yue: 呢個設施開到下午六點。
translations.pt: O centro fica aberto até às seis da tarde.
translations.vi: Cơ sở này mở cửa đến sáu giờ tối.
translations.nl: Het centrum is open tot zes uur 's avonds.
translations.hu: A létesítmény este hatig nyitva van.
translations.hi: यह सुविधा शाम छह बजे तक खुली रहती है.
translations.pl: Obiekt jest otwarty do szóstej wieczorem.
translations.el: Η εγκατάσταση είναι ανοιχτή μέχρι τις έξι το απόγευμα.
translations.id: Fasilitas ini buka sampai pukul enam sore.
translations.sv: Anläggningen är öppen till klockan sex på kvällen.
translations.ro: Centrul este deschis până la ora șase seara.
translations.cs: Zařízení je otevřené do šesti večer.
translations.da: Centret har åbent til klokken seks om aftenen.
translations.fi: Keskus on auki kello kuuteen illalla.
translations.ja: 施設は午後6時まで開いています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the subject NP in nominative (feminine singular).
Common noun (feminine); head of the subject NP. In this context refers to an establishment/institution.
Finite auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; forms a periphrastic predicate with the participle 'geöffnet' to express being open.
Preposition introducing a temporal limit PP ('bis achtzehn Uhr') modifying the predicate.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'Uhr' to specify the exact time.
Common noun meaning 'hour/clock'; head of the time NP complement of 'bis'.
Past participle (Partizip II) forming a periphrastic predicate with 'hat'; lexicalized meaning 'to be open'.

sentences.target: Ich suche eine öffentliche Einrichtung in der Nähe.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈœfn̩tlɪçə ˈaɪ̯nʁɪçtʊŋ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈnɛːə./

translations.de: Ich suche eine öffentliche Einrichtung in der Nähe.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈœfn̩tlɪçə ˈaɪ̯nʁɪçtʊŋ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈnɛːə./
translations.en: I'm looking for a public institution nearby.
translations.es: Busco una institución pública cerca de aquí.
translations.fr: Je cherche un établissement public à proximité.
translations.it: Sto cercando un'istituzione pubblica nelle vicinanze.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找附近的公共机构。
translations.yue: 我喺度搵附近嘅公共機構。
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma instituição pública aqui perto.
translations.he: אני מחפש מוסד ציבורי בקרבת מקום.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một cơ sở công cộng gần đây.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een openbare instelling in de buurt.
translations.hi: मैं पास में कोई सार्वजनिक संस्था ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω έναν δημόσιο φορέα εδώ κοντά.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en offentlig institusjon i nærheten.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari institusi publik di dekat sini.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en offentlig institution i närheten.
translations.ro: Caut o instituție publică în apropiere.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en offentlig institution i nærheden.
translations.ja: 近くの公的機関を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Indefinite article; agrees feminine singular accusative with 'Einrichtung' as the direct object.
Attributive adjective; inflected to match feminine singular accusative 'Einrichtung'.
Common noun (feminine); head of the direct object NP, here meaning a public institution/facility.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a locative PP modifying the search target.
Definite article, feminine singular dative; determiner of 'Nähe' in the PP 'in der Nähe'.
Common noun (feminine) meaning 'proximity/vicinity'; head of the PP complement to 'in'.
